summary: Comprehensive testing of Sub-Parameter Analysis Module. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working via Playwright automation including scenario selector, metric selector, variation slider, sensitivity tornado charts, what-if analysis with diff cards, Shapley attribution bar chart, and pairwise interactions list.

issues: Minor: In Interactions tab, all interactions show as 'independent' with 0.0 effect - this is expected behavior for scenarios with uncorrelated parameters but may look underwhelming to users

critical_code_review_comments: Sensitivity Rankings shows duplicate entries for same parameter (Emissions|CO2|Energy twice at 198.82%) - this may be due to scenario having multiple trajectory entries for same variable
seed_data_creation: 102 hub scenarios available. Tested with WITCH 1.5C (3 trajectories) and Below 2°C [MESSAGEix-GLOBIOM 2.0-M-R12-NGFS] (19 trajectories).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sub-Parameter Analysis module fully tested. Works with all 102 hub scenarios. API endpoints: GET /api/v1/sub-parameter/parameters (9 analyzable params), POST /sensitivity-analysis (tornado data), POST /what-if (baseline vs modified), POST /what-if/batch (multiple sets), POST /attribution (Shapley), GET /interactions/{id} (pairwise), GET /visualization/tornado/{id}, GET /visualization/waterfall/{id}. Frontend at /sub-analysis has 4 tabs (Sensitivity/What-If/Attribution/Interactions). Uses Recharts for charts.
passed_tests: Page header shows 'Sub-Parameter Analysis' with description
Scenario selector shows 50+ options from 102 hub scenarios
Target Metric dropdown: Temperature, Physical Risk, Transition Risk, Overall Risk
'Run All Analyses' button triggers sensitivity, attribution, interactions
Sensitivity tab: Tornado Chart with parameter bars, Sensitivity Rankings list
What-If tab: Configure form (parameter, change%, year), Run button, Key Insights, 4 diff cards
Attribution tab: Outcome value, Explained %, Attribution Breakdown bar chart
Interactions tab: Parameter Interactions list with type badges (synergistic/antagonistic/independent)
